steps.title: Identify the chronological jump
steps.content: The strongest clue is the specific dates: “by 1593” (one achievement) followed by “in 1599” (a later achievement). This signals forward movement in time.

steps.title: Choose the transition marking forward progression
steps.content: ”Later,” directly expresses this passage of time between the two achievements. The other three don't work—”In other words” suggests restating, “Conversely” suggests contrast, and “Thus” suggests logical consequence. That matches choice D — D is correct.
